title: Ornithocephalus bonitensis
taxonomy: Ornithocephalus bonitensis is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. This family, Orchidaceae, consists of approximately 30,000 to 40,000 known species of orchids worldwide, making it the second-largest family of flowering plants. The classification of Ornithocephalus bonitensis places it within the tribe Cranichideae. Further classification includes its genus, Ornithocephalus, which is a relatively small genus of orchids native to South America. As part of its broader classification, Ornithocephalus bonitensis is a member of the kingdom Plantae.
